message:
feat: add molecule lifecycle tracking to JSONL backup and Dolt backup dogs

Wrap syncJsonlGitBackup and syncDoltBackups with mol-dog-jsonl and
mol-dog-backup molecule lifecycles. Each patrol now tracks export/push/report
steps (or sync/offsite/report for backup). Graceful degradation — if bd
is unavailable, all molecule methods are no-ops.

Integrates polecat work from slit (gt-83r4) and dementus (gt-vgym),
adapted to use nux's dog_molecule.go API already on main.

Co-Authored-By: slit <steve.yegge@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: dementus <steve.yegge@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
